title: senecio corymbosus
intro: Senecio corymbosus, also known as round-leaved groundsel, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, with its leaves and roots exhibiting anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The medicinal properties of Senecio corymbosus may provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, soothing wounds, and aiding in digestion. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
